description: Set the damping scheme used by the structural elements for static analysis (see Mechanical Damping ). The following keywords are available:

keywords.name: combined-local
keywords.description: combined damping. The combined damping factor is f1 .

keywords.name: local
keywords.description: local damping. This is the default setting for static mode . The local damping factor is f1 with the default value 0.8.
